name: folded-headers
description: Message with folded (multi-line) headers per RFC 5322 section 2.2.3
input:
From: sender@example.com
To: recipient@example.com
Subject: This is a very long subject line that
 has been folded across multiple lines
Date: Mon, 27 Jan 2026 10:00:00 +0000
Message-ID: <folded-123@example.com>

Body text.

expectedHeaders.Subject: This is a very long subject line that has been folded across multiple lines
